reviews.comment:
Muy caro el café y encima  re feo  ni jugo te dan a ese precio  1600 es un robo le pedí el tiket y no tenia  más caro que en otro lados

(Translated by Google)
The coffee was way too expensive and awful, they don't even give you juice at that price. 1600 is a rip-off. I asked for the receipt and they didn't have one, it was more expensive than elsewhere.

reviews.comment:
La verdad son increíbles, amables en la atención, está tarde del 17 de agosto de 2023, fui a merendar luego me di cuenta no encontraba la llave de mi vehículo, cdo estaba trabajando pase por el acá 67 nuevamente, los chicos de turno con total amabilidad al verme por el vidrio me hacían señal que allí estaba mi llave, q encontraron en la silla, la verdad gran gesto que generó mi tranquilidad y meditar que aún eso agrego calidad a lo que ya nos tienen acostumbrados en ACA, 67. Gracias por todo!

(Translated by Google)
They are truly amazing, so kind and helpful. This afternoon, August 17, 2023, I went to get a snack and then realized I couldn't find my car key. While I was at work, I stopped by ACA 67 again, and the staff on duty, seeing me through the window, very kindly signaled that my key was there, that they had found it on the chair. It was a really nice gesture that put my mind at ease and made me realize that it added to the already excellent service we've come to expect from ACA 67. Thank you for everything!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwM0xHd1BREAE
